title: Nether's Exoticism
description: 🥭 New exotic fruits, potion and effect for the Nether !
body:
**Nether's Exotism is a mod that adds 5 exotic fruits that exist in real life, each nether biome receives a fruit. You can consume these fruits directly and have some special effects, but you can also do something else with them...** I'm French and this mod was done with Mcreator (Sorry if I make mistakes in English 😅)  Here are the 5 fruits that are added by Nether Exoticism, the [Jabuticaba](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jabuticaba) (Spawn in Basalt Deltas and give a "Cure" effect), the [Kiwano](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cucumis_metuliferus) (Spawn in Warped Forest and give a "fire resistance" effect) the [Rambutan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rambutan) (Spawn in Nether Wastes and give a "regeneration" effect), the Buddha's Hand (Spawn in Soul Sand Valley and give a "night vision" effect), and the [Pitaya](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pitaya) (Spawn in Crimsom Forest and give a "wither cure" effect) ! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/568/image1.png) You can make blocks, they are used to store but also to decorate![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/569/image2.png) Nether's Exoticism adds a rival creature to the Axlolotl, a **Moloch**, the Thorny Devil ! A small creature that can be obtain in villager cleric trade or in nether forteress chest, you can collect it in a bucket to take it wherever you want, but be careful, don't hit it, you risk getting stung ! He loves eating small arthopods such as Spiders, Silverfish, Endermite but he also likes to eat slime or magma cube. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/570/image3.png) Here are the fruit trees : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/571/image4.png)   With the trees of Jabuticaba and Rambutan, you can make planks, doors, slabs, stairs ... like wood. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/572/image5.png)   With rambutan you can make a helmet and shield that does damage to the entity around ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/573/image6.png)   You can do a lot of other things with the fruits, with the Kiwano, you can make an armor and tool set that automatically cooks whatever you break with it. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/574/image7.png)   With Jaboticaba Jam you can make new potions ! (Wither Cure, Fire Resistance, Saturation and Night Vision) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/575/image8.png) Nether's Exoticism is compatible with Create so you can store Jabuticaba Juice in tanks, Jabuticaba can be compacted with a press to make Juice, Glass Bottle can be filled with Juice to make Jam..   This mod adds compatibility with Farmer's Delight, so Kiwano, Bouddha's Hand and Pitaya can be cut to make Sliced Kiwano, Chopped Bouddha's Hand and Cut Pitaya. And Adds Unsettling and Curious Fruits Salad that combine the different effect of each fruit ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/576/image9.png)  Nether's Exoticism Lego Set **The Jam Hut ;**

   **The Moloch Trap :**

  You can put Nether's Exoticism in your modpack !
